case_title: THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA VS. DANIEL J. MCCAMPBELL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCCAMPBELL, DANIEL J. (SBN 117047) $11,362.67 PRINCIPAL, $6,718.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $6,761.90 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, $882.00 CLIENT SECURITY FUND PROCESSING FEE. THE AMOUNT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $26,174.57, IN ATTORNY FEES REPRESENTS PAYMENTS MADE BY THE CLIENT SECURITY FUND PURS TO BUS AND PROF CODE SECTION 6140.5(C).
